pendingApplications.address: Proposed Holiday Let Accommodation At Chapel Lane Broseley Shropshire
pendingApplications.proposal: Variation of Condition No.2 (approved plans) attached to planning permission 12/03908/FUL to allow for minor design amendments. Condition Number(s): Condition 2 (Approved Plans) relating to the approved drawings and specification. Conditions(s) Removal: The application seeks to vary Condition 2 (Approved Plans) to enable minor design amendments arising from the progression of the scheme through detailed design. The proposed changes include rationalisation of external openings following removal of a balcony element, minor refinement to render detailing, coordination of site layout and drainage features including the septic tank, and an update to the window and door specification to achieve improved thermal performance in accordance with current Building Regulations. The amendments are minor in nature and do not alter the approved scale, height, massing, siting, or overall design principles of the development. The proposals do not result in any additional planning or visual impacts and remain fully consistent with the original planning permission. It is proposed that Condition 2 (Approved Plans) be varied to allow the development to be carried out in accordance with the amended drawings submitted as part of this application. The amended drawings reflect minor revisions to external openings, removal of the balcony element, simplified render detailing, coordination of site layout and drainage features including the septic tank, and an updated window and door specification to improve thermal performance. All other approved plans and conditions remain unchanged and continue to apply.
